seoTitle: Turners Flat vs Tuross — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Turners Flat and Tuross. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Turners Flat vs Tuross: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Turners Flat and Tuross.
heading: Turners Flat vs Tuross — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Turners Flat, New South Wales and Tuross, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Turners Flat has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Tuross (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Turners Flat or Tuross safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Turners Flat has a flood risk score of 35/100, while Tuross scores 53/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Turners Flat scores 21/100 for bushfire risk. Tuross scores 50/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Turners Flat or Tuross?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Turners Flat has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.03% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
